CVE-2017-17516.title: scripts/inspect_webbrowser.py in Reddit Terminal Viewer (RTV) 1.1 ...
CVE-2017-17516.summary: scripts/inspect_webbrowser.py in Reddit Terminal Viewer (RTV) 1.19.0 does not validate strings before launching the program specified by the BROWSER environment variable, which might allow remote attackers to conduct argument-injection attacks via a crafted URL.
